mapper.sql: select user_id, openid, unionid, nick_name, avatar_url, phone, real_name, id_number_cipher, id_number_masked, car_model, member_status, member_card_no, join_time, app_admin_type, status, last_login_ip, last_login_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from mc_user
mapper.select: select count(1) from mc_user where avatar_url = #{avatarUrl} or avatar_url like concat('%', #{avatarUrl})
mapper.delete:
delete from mc_user where user_id in
#{userId}
